title: Resource Planning Data Analyst
description: A Snapshot of Your DayWe are seeking a talented and experienced Resource Planning Data Analyst to join our Gas Services Solutions  Operational Excellence Team at Siemens Energy. In this pivotal role, you will be responsible for conducting comprehensive resource planning and resource data analysis for our solutions business.
